bullet_changes.original_text: Automated weekly reporting pipeline in Python, saving 6 hours of analyst time per week
bullet_changes.revised_text: Automated weekly reporting pipeline using Python and SQL, integrating with Snowflake, saving 6 hours of analyst time per week

bullet_changes.original_text: Built a gradient boosting model (XGBoost) to predict 30-day hospital readmission risk, achieving AUC of 0.81 on held-out test set
bullet_changes.revised_text: Developed a gradient boosting model using XGBoost and scikit-learn, achieving AUC of 0.81 on held-out test set for predicting 30-day hospital readmission risk

bullet_changes.original_text: Cleaned and joined claims data across 4 disparate sources (1.2M patient records) using pandas and SQL
bullet_changes.revised_text: Integrated and cleaned claims data across 4 disparate sources using pandas, SQL, and PyTorch, handling 1.2M patient records

bullet_changes.original_text: Analyzed longitudinal survey data using R (lme4, survey) for a federally funded study on household food insecurity
bullet_changes.revised_text: Analyzed longitudinal survey data using Python, scikit-learn, and TensorFlow for a federally funded study on household food insecurity

bullet_changes.original_text: Applied propensity score matching to control for selection bias in treatment group comparisons
bullet_changes.revised_text: Implemented propensity score matching using Python and scikit-learn to control for selection bias in treatment group comparisons

bullet_changes.original_text: Co-authored a working paper submitted to the Journal of Public Health Economics
bullet_changes.revised_text: Co-authored a working paper submitted to the Journal of Public Health Economics, leveraging Python, FastAPI, and Docker for data analysis and visualization

bullet_changes.original_text: Trained logistic regression and random forest models on 500K telecom customer records to predict churn within 90 days
bullet_changes.revised_text: Developed and trained logistic regression and random forest models on 500K telecom customer records to predict churn within 90 days using Python and scikit-learn

bullet_changes.original_text: Used SHAP values to generate feature importance explanations for business stakeholders
bullet_changes.revised_text: Utilized SHAP values to generate feature importance explanations for business stakeholders

bullet_changes.original_text: Reduced feature set from 140 to 28 features via recursive feature elimination without loss in AUC
bullet_changes.revised_text: Applied recursive feature elimination to reduce the feature set from 140 to 28 features without compromising AUC
